message:
fix(writing): resolve remaining build errors in bakery and hoeffding

bakery-article.tsx:
- Fix JSX/template literal syntax error in code block display
- Properly close template literal before inline JSX tooltip elements
- Escape < and {} characters using JSX expressions for code display

hoeffding-visualizations.tsx:
- Add missing ShieldCheck import from lucide-react

These fixes resolve the Turbopack build failure and restore
successful compilation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
